description: Review a Salesforce engagement Case and decide whether to send the outreach @mention to the Primary TAM.

primary_tam_user_id.title: Primary TAM User Id
primary_tam_user_id.description: Salesforce User.Id resolved via Contact.Email → User.Email. Used for Chatter @mention.

account_type.title: Account Type
account_type.description: From Account_Type__c formula (e.g. Enterprise, Platinum Tier)

products_mentioned.title: Products Mentioned
products_mentioned.description: Products inferred by the Agent from the description

needs_questions.title: Agent: Questions Needed
needs_questions.description: true when the Agent found at least one missing sufficiency dimension

agent_reasoning.title: Agent: Reasoning Note
agent_reasoning.description: Agent's brief explanation of which dimensions are missing

outreach_preview.title: Outreach Preview
outreach_preview.description: Full Chatter message text the Flow will post on Approve (rendered with suggested_questions)

decision.title: Decision
decision.description: approve = post outreach as-is; edit = use final_questions instead; reject = skip this case silently

final_questions.title: Final Questions
final_questions.description: Reviewer-edited question list. Flow falls back to suggested_questions when empty and decision=approve.

reviewer_comment.title: Reviewer Comment
reviewer_comment.description: Internal note from the reviewer (not posted to Chatter)
